overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a dystopian urban commercial district. The player character moves past a neon-lit gun store, through open courtyards and covered market areas, and ascends stairs through increasingly dark corridors and maintenance areas.

agents.ego_description: walking past the 2nd Amendment gun store, moving toward an open courtyard area

notable_agents.action: standing near the corner of the building, looking at a device

entered.detail: storefront with large red neon signage and glass display windows showing weapons
bright red neon sign reading '2ND AMENDMENT' mounted above the store
illuminated posters advertising guns and sales in the store windows
open concrete area with scattered debris leading to apartment buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view facing the 2nd Amendment gun store, bathed in red neon light. The player walks forward along the concrete sidewalk, passing the storefront and approaching an open courtyard area with apartment buildings visible in the distance.

events.description: entering area illuminated by green fluorescent lights, shifting from red to green ambient lighting
moving from open courtyard into covered walkway with checkered tile pattern

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard and entering a covered walkway with checkered flooring

notable_agents.action: standing on the raised concrete platform, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: raised concrete platform with yellow painted edges in the center of the courtyard
clotheslines with laundry strung between apartment balconies
strip lighting emitting green glow along the ceiling of the covered area
black and white checkered tile pattern on the ground of the covered walkway
long concrete bench with a person sitting on it

segments.scene_description: The player moves through an open courtyard featuring a raised concrete platform, then transitions into a covered walkway illuminated by green fluorescent lights. The environment shifts from the red neon of the gun store to a green-lit corridor with distinctive checkered flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor market corridor with food stalls

events.description: entering market area with food vendors and illuminated advertisement screens

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market area, passing food stalls and vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall counter, preparing food

entered.detail: food stall with counter and illuminated menu displays
red neon sign indicating 24-hour service
illuminated vending machine with colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow enclosed market corridor with checkered flooring, passing food stalls and vending machines. The area is moderately populated with NPCs browsing the stalls, and the lighting shifts to a mix of pink and blue neon from various signs.

events.description: corridor becomes significantly darker with only sparse artificial lighting
approaching and entering the stairwell area

agents.ego_description: walking through darkening corridors, following an NPC toward a stairwell

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player toward the stairwell, wearing red clothing

entered.detail: dark concrete walls with minimal lighting and graffiti
large archway leading to darker sections of the building
illuminated advertisement screen showing colorful graphics
opening leading to concrete stairs with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The player moves through increasingly dark corridors with concrete floors, passing digital advertisement screens. The environment transitions from the commercial market to a service corridor, following an NPC toward a stairwell entrance.

events.description: ascending the concrete stairs to the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and moving through the upper level corridor

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs in the opposite direction, wearing a plaid jacket

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with yellow safety markings on edges
metal handrails with wooden tops along both sides of the stairs
wall covered in colorful graffiti and posters
metal security gate with mesh blocking the corridor ahead

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a concrete stairwell with metal railings, passing graffiti-covered walls. Upon reaching the upper level, the scene opens into a maintenance corridor with a visible security gate ahead and an NPC descending the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper maintenance level with security checkpoint

events.description: passing through the metal security gate into the restricted maintenance area
entering dimly lit room with minimal yellow lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the security gate and exploring the dark maintenance corridors

notable_agents.action: two individuals walking together through the corridor ahead

entered.detail: large digital advertisement screen displaying 'NICOLA' branding
utility boxes and equipment stacked along the corridor wall
darkened doorway with an 'Open' interaction prompt visible

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and passes through a metal security gate into a restricted maintenance area. The corridor features digital advertisement screens and utility equipment, leading to a darkened doorway at the end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial street into the sterile, darkened depths of a restricted maintenance zone. It begins by moving past the red neon glow of a gun store along a concrete sidewalk, transitioning into an open courtyard before entering a covered walkway defined by green fluorescent lighting and checkered floors. As the camera pushes further into a narrow market corridor, the lighting shifts again into a mix of pink and blue neon amidst food stalls and browsing NPCs. The scene then descends into increasingly dark service corridors and digital advertisements, following a path toward a concrete stairwell with graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera ascends to an upper level and passes through a metal security gate, moving through a utility-filled maintenance hall toward a darkened doorway.
